title: I Love You Novelty Chocolate Bar Wrapper Lovely Gift for Birthday Valentine #140 (without chocolate)
features: This novelty product can be gifted to any of your loved oneson any special occations such as Christmas, Birthday, anniversary, new baby and Greetings.
This chocolate wrapper suitable for 100g chocolates or similar size chocolates.

If you choose to buy with chocolate, we'll send 100g or similar size Galaxy smooth milk chocolate bar with wrapper. If you choose to buy without chocolate, we'll send wrapper only. You can easily wrap 100g or similar size chocolate with the wrapper and stick it with provided adhesive tape. No cutting required.
Please note, actual product colours may be vary from display images.
